text.message: I’m not going for brick port blue fyi
i can't compete on ows here
i dont have wheat to trade
vicky bhai tumse zyaada chutia insaan nahi dekha maine aaj tak
even though he was fighting army
Now his game will really move
blue you wanna help me settle on wheat?
or am i helping red get to the port
probably wheat and the wood at some point
will you hold your next wheat?
if you dont i have a road for red in hand
i'm holding the road for you red
I have nothing you need still
you could have given me last turn
blue is still a huge threat lol
chutiye tujhe army kaise milegi road khel na bsdk
gawarpana hi nahi khatam hota hai
the idiot didnt even try to extend
cant do much when people are just dumb
you'll just settle like a fool
ek game jeet le zindagi mai
kisi aur ki madad se hi ho bhale
cant believe he still lost lol
idk what he's extending for at this point
